F=p(k)local q=function(q,c)return M(u,{q,c},k,F)end return q end,function(u,k)local F=p(k)local q=function(q,c,U,v,Y,B)return M(u,{q,c;U,v;Y,B},k,F)end return q end,function(u,k)local F=p(k)local q=function(q)return M(u,{q},k,F)end return q end,function(u)b[u]=b[u]-(-520205-(-520206))if 200440+-200440==b[u]then b[u],B[u]=nil,nil end end return(e(15475463-(-986486),{}))(F(Y))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[k(90804-40479)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
